overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban park. The player moves from an open plaza with a large metallic statue, through tree-lined pathways and a dark underpass, up to an elevated walkway, and finally into a rocky natural area with dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with metallic statue and seating

events.description: camera pans upward to view the large metallic statue from below

agents.ego_description: walking around the plaza, observing the large metallic statue and people resting nearby

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near a red couch
person sitting on a concrete ledge with camping gear

entered.detail: massive abstract bronze sculpture with outstretched arms holding a horizontal beam
bright red sofa placed outdoors in the plaza
large rectangular concrete planter with vegetation

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a sunlit urban plaza featuring a massive metallic statue as the centerpiece. A few people are sitting around on concrete ledges and near a red couch, while the camera pans around to take in the sculpture from different angles.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined park pathway with graffiti walls

events.description: exits open plaza into narrower tree-lined pathway with concrete walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the shaded pathway, passing concrete walls covered in graffiti

notable_agents.action: person sitting on top of a concrete wall with graffiti

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
futuristic cyan glowing light post along the pathway
simple concrete seating blocks along the path

segments.scene_description: Moving from the plaza into a narrower park pathway, the camera passes a graffiti-covered concrete wall on the right where a person sits. The path is lined with dense trees and futuristic cyan light posts, creating a shaded corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: pathway approaching covered underpass with light posts

events.description: entering increasingly shaded area as the path approaches the underpass
approaching the dark tunnel entrance under the highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the dark underpass, following the cyan light posts and a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead into the underpass wearing light-colored clothing

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass creating a dark tunnel ahead
illuminated advertisement screen visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The pathway leads toward a dark underpass beneath a massive highway structure. The lighting becomes increasingly diffused and dim as the camera approaches the tunnel entrance, following a distant pedestrian and passing rows of cyan light posts.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass transitioning to concrete stairway

events.description: entering the dark covered underpass beneath the highway
exiting the dark tunnel back into bright sunlight
beginning to ascend the concrete stairs to upper level

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark underpass and ascending the stairs to the upper level

notable_agents.action: person descending the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase leading up to the upper level
large red illuminated billboard with 'Cyberpunk' text visible on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the dark underpass beneath the highway, illuminated only by cyan light posts and distant exits. After passing through, it emerges into bright sunlight and begins ascending a wide concrete staircase, passing a pedestrian coming down. A large red digital billboard is visible on the right wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with benches and planters

events.description: emerging onto the upper walkway with planters and benches

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated pathway, passing decorated benches and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: two people standing and conversing on the pathway

entered.detail: raised concrete planter bed with greenery on top
green painted bench with decorative patterns on the side
futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background

segments.scene_description: Having ascended the stairs, the camera moves along an elevated pedestrian walkway lined with green decorated benches and concrete planters. The area is sunlit with futuristic glass skyscrapers visible in the background, and a few pedestrians are seen conversing along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: naturalistic path with large boulders and dense foliage

events.description: entering rocky natural area with large boulders and stone path

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow path between large rocks and dense vegetation

entered.detail: massive natural rock formation blocking the left side of the path
irregular stone pavers forming a naturalistic walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a more naturalistic area with large rock boulders and a stone stepping path. The dense vegetation creates a forest-like atmosphere within the urban environment, with the camera navigating between the rocks and trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open urban plaza into the dim, enclosed depths of a city underpass. It begins in a sunlit square, panning around a massive metallic statue while passing people resting on concrete ledges and a red couch. As the camera leaves the plaza, the environment narrows into a shaded park pathway lined with dense trees and futuristic cyan light posts, passing a graffiti-covered wall. The scene then shifts toward a massive highway structure, where the lighting becomes increasingly diffused and dim. Finally, the camera follows a distant pedestrian into the dark mouth of the tunnel, moving past rows of glowing posts as the open sky disappears.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a dim urban underpass into a sunlit elevated walkway and finally into a secluded natural grove. It begins by passing through a dark highway underpass illuminated by cyan light posts before emerging into bright sunlight to ascend a wide concrete staircase past a red digital billboard. As the camera reaches the top, the scene opens onto an elevated pedestrian walkway featuring green benches and concrete planters set against a backdrop of futuristic glass skyscrapers. The environment then shifts from this structured urban path into a more organic landscape characterized by large rock boulders and a stone stepping path. Finally, the camera navigates through dense vegetation and trees, completing the journey into a forest-like sanctuary within the city.
